title: Partner Workshops
description: Cognition provided codebases and sample prompts for self-paced hands-on labs. For use in Cognition or Partner hosted events. Includes modular challenges across 12 engineering disciplines and reusable workshop templates.

contentGroups.title: Workshops
contentGroups.description: Reusable workshop templates that compose challenges into structured lab sequences

contentGroups.title: Modules
contentGroups.description: Self-contained challenge modules organized by engineering discipline (77 modules across 12 categories)

setupGuide.title: Workshop Metadata Repository
setupGuide.description: Central index with repo catalog, modular challenges, workshop templates, and event definitions

setupGuide.description: Runtime setup, logistics, and facilitation best practices

setupGuide.title: Host Your Own Workshop
setupGuide.description: Guide for partners to host their own Devin workshop events
